description_long: This house features a complex, multi-level structure with a dark, gabled roof and several protruding sections, giving it a layered appearance. The exterior walls are primarily dark with some lighter, striped patterns, and the roof is covered in a shingle-like texture. There are multiple windows, some grouped in rows and others more irregularly placed, suggesting a mix of traditional and modern design elements. A prominent, colorful, angular structure juts out from one side, adding a unique, artistic flair to the otherwise conventional form. The base of the house is a large, rectangular platform with a high-contrast black and white pattern. The overall design suggests a residential building with both functional and decorative architectural features.
description: A multi-level house with a dark gabled roof, mixed window arrangements, and a striking colorful angular structure on one side, set atop a bold black-and-white patterned base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered roof, grouped windows, and the striped base pattern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the deep overhangs, open porch area, and the colorful angular structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with three prominent windows and a clear view of the striped base and roof details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the angular structure in full, additional roof sections, and a secondary entry area.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch, and overhanging roof; minimal decorative elements.
